title: Creator's Pack
description: A fabric-based modpack aimed to make it more accessible for creators to create Minecraft content through the help of various mods.
body:
A fabric-based modpack aimed to make it more accessible for creators to create Minecraft content through the help of various mods.

 

Content Creation

The latest version of Replay Mod to save and edit your latest clips!
 
![](https://i.gyazo.com/2fb270fc1717b4489119ffa9c7bd90de.png)


Litematica and all of Masa's other mods to assist with tedious builds, or, download various schematics from https://abfielder.com/!
 
![](https://i.gyazo.com/d49d5abf582a14bb9a3b0950f0c1c501.png)


Quality-of-Life mods, such as Reacharound for Bedrock/Quark building mechanics!

![](https://i.gyazo.com/cdce54a5f323815f2e94539a463c38ef.png)


Iris Shaders to enhance your visuals!

 ![](https://i.gyazo.com/cbc10463ac5bd5f36d43c675702a058b.png)


Performance mods such as Sodium, Indium, Entity Culling, and more for better performance than Optifine!

 ![](https://i.gyazo.com/77be7437bfaf280617a89c71cc14148a.png)

 

PLEASE NOTE: You may experience a slight FPS drop (0%-10%) while recording gameplay. Automatic recordings are off by default, but can be changed in Replay Mod in-game settings or config!
